loop1.note: Showing current distribution across outgoing feeders; voltage, sag, swell, neutral, unbalance, and deviation metrics are not measured by the panel aggregate stub and are omitted.

loop1.note: Showing OUTGOING member panels (UPS-01 to UPS-06, BPDB-01, BPDB-02); INCOMER members (Solar Incomer-1, Solar Incomer-2, Transformer-01, Transformer-02) are dark and omitted from the roster.
